title: Egyptian Toast
description: A simple and delicious breakfast dish inspired by Egyptian cuisine, featuring toasted bread topped with a variety of ingredients.
instructions: Slice the funky bread into 1-inch pieces.
Place the bread pieces on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
While the bread is toasting, combine the chewy and egyptian in a small bowl.
Once the bread is done toasting, remove it from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Spread the chewy-egyptian mixture onto the toasted bread slices.
